title: Craftable Villager egg
description: This mod lets you craft villagers using emeralds and a hay bale, perfect for survival worlds without villages.
body:
Description
Can't find a village in your Minecraft world? This mod solves that problem!

🏡 What this mod does:
This mod allows you to craft villagers using materials that match their natural environment.
Each type of villager can be crafted with specific items, such as emeralds and Bay Bale.

🛠️ Example recipe:
You can craft a villager using 8 emeralds surrounding 1 Bay Bale in the crafting table.

🧩 Features:

Craftable villagers using different materials

Works with survival mode

Supports Forge [version number]

📦 Compatibility:
Tested with Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).
Should work with other structure or village mods as well.
